synopsis: Jedi Master Tholme has been captured by the dreaded Morgukai assassins, and the ship carrying his would-be rescuers -- Jedi Quinlan Vos and Aayla Secura -- has been shot down in the lifeless deserts of the planet Kintan. The brave Jedi take everything the Endless Wastes have to throw at them, from searing heat to flesh-scouring sandstorms, but their real challenge comes when they must face the Morgukai...
title: Republic #44: Rite of Passage, Part 3
